text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"Create BDD tests for dashboard and routing","description":"Create API-level BDD tests using Vitest + Fastify .inject():

tests/bdd/account-setup.test.js:
- First-time setup: Given no accounts → POST /api/accounts with key → GET /api/accounts returns 1 account status "unknown"
- Test key validity: Given account exists → POST /api/accounts/:id/test → status updated to "active" or "invalid"
- Rotate key: Given account with old key → PUT /api/accounts/:id/key → old deleted, new created
- Delete account: Given 2 accounts → DELETE /api/accounts/:id → only 1 remains
- Key security: Given account created → GET /api/accounts → api_key is undefined (stripped)
- Key backup email: Given email configured → POST /api/accounts/backup → email sent with encrypted keys

tests/bdd/routing-config.test.js:
- Quality gates: Given model without tool support → request has tools → model excluded
- Trust tier filtering: Given "private" tier request → only local models considered
- Rate limit visibility: Given rate limiter with recorded requests → GET /api/rate-limits → usage data returned

Key files: tests/helpers/testDb.js, src/router/app.js, src/db/repositories/accounts.js","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:42:06.991Z"}

Task #2 complete. All 5 dashboard chart components created:

- `src/dashboard/src/components/DashboardCard.svelte` (84 LOC) — dark paper card with SVG grain texture, torn-edge filter, Permanent Marker/Special Elite fonts, accent colors
- `src/dashboard/src/components/BarChart.svelte` (104 LOC) — pure SVG, animated on mount, hover tooltips, hand-drawn stroke variation
- `src/dashboard/src/components/AreaChart.svelte` (120 LOC) — time series with gradient fill, hover dots, X/Y axis labels, responsive viewBox
- `src/dashboard/src/components/DonutChart.svelte` (114 LOC) — stroke-dasharray segments, hover highlight, center total, legend
- `src/dashboard/src/components/SavingsComparison.svelte` (137 LOC) — animated $effect counter, side-by-side bars, reuses BarChart for per-provider breakdown

All use Svelte 5 runes ($state, $derived, $effect), zero external deps, dark paper palette (#1a1816/#252220/#3a3530), warm accents (#27864a/#d4831a/#7b68a8).

Task #3 (Redesign dashboard views) is now unblocked — ready to be assigned.

IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE
Task: Create load testing harness | Files: tests/load/routing-simulation.test.js (196 LOC) | Summary: Built MockAdapter extending BaseAdapter with configurable shouldFail/latencyMs/failAfter/response; 7 scenarios covering cheapest-first routing (50 sequential requests), rate limit exhaustion with fallback, circuit breaker at threshold=3, timeout/fallback via executeWithFallback, capability filtering (tools+vision), budget enforcement, and provider_stats DB verification. All 9 tests pass (1.00s). Security scan clean — no secrets found.
summary: Task 4 complete — all 9 load tests pass

Tasks #1 and #6 are both complete.

Task #1 (usage repo + API endpoints):
- `src/db/repositories/usage.js` — added `getTimeseries(days)` and `getByProviderAggregated(since)`
- `src/router/app.js` — added `GET /api/usage/timeseries`, `GET /api/usage/by-provider`, `POST /api/accounts/backup` (encrypts with `encryptApiKey`, sends email with attachment)
- `src/email/mailer.js` — `send()` now accepts optional 4th `attachments` param
- `src/dashboard/src/lib/api.js` — added `usageTimeseries(days)`, `usageByProvider()`, `backupKeys()`

Task #6 (PDF report + email integration):
- Installed `pdfkit`
- Created `src/email/pdf-report.js` with `PdfReportGenerator` class (generates ~1.6KB PDF)
- Updated `src/email/digest.js` `buildDaily()` to generate PDF and return `attachments` array
- Updated `src/email/scheduler.js` `sendDigest()` to pass attachments to `mailer.send()`

No blocked issues. Task #3 (dashboard redesign) is next and unblocked now that #1 and #2 are done.

Task #8 complete. Created 7 content planning documents in docs/articles/:

1. 01-replace-openclaw-heartbeat.md — Migration guide outline, config comparison table, covers healthMonitor + circuit breaker vs. polling heartbeat
2. 02-freeloader-for-claude-code.md — OPENAI_BASE_URL setup, trust tier strategy for code vs. docs, free vs. premium model selection
3. 03-freeloader-for-langchain.md — Python + JS examples, LangGraph tiered model nodes, per-chain cost tracking callback
4. 04-freeloader-for-ide-tools.md — Cursor/Continue/Aider/Zed setup configs, model recommendations by task type, trust tiers for private code
5. 05-freeloader-for-vercel-ai.md — Next.js App Router streaming example, per-user budget controls, dev/prod env config
6. 06-top-50-llm-tools.md — Full 50-tool survey table across 7 categories with Freeloader compatibility ratings (34 High, 7 Medium, 9 Low)
7. 07-zero-dollar-ai-stack.md — Dual-format (5-min video script + 2000-word article), includes "Gemini Gambit", "Groq Express", "Cerebras Speedrun", "Local Lockdown" tips

Each doc has: title, target audience, H2 outline, copy-pasteable code examples, estimated length, SEO keywords.
